19.gl: the lobe or flap of the liver (as if redundant or outhanging)

20.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
20.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

20.gl: to smoke, i.e. turn into fragrance by fire (especially as an act of worship)
20.kj: burn (incense, sacrifice) (upon), (altar for) incense, kindle, offer (incense, a sacrifice).
20.dv: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of fumigation in a close place and perhaps thus driving out the occupants);

20.gl: fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part
20.dv: or חֵלֶב; from an unused root meaning to be fat;

20.gl: the breast (as most seen in front)

21.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
21.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
21.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

21.gl: to quiver (i.e. vibrate up and down, or rock to and fro); used in a great variety of applications (including sprinkling, beckoning, rubbing, bastinadoing, sawing, waving, etc.)
21.kj: lift up, move, offer, perfume, send, shake, sift, strike, wave.

21.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south

21.kj: appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order.

21.gl: a brandishing (in threat); by implication, tumult; specifically, the official undulation of sacrificial offerings
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
21.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
